title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 532.170 - Return made, when
text:
532.170.  Return made, when. — If the place of hearing be within twenty miles of the place of service, the return shall be made within twenty-four hours after service of the writ, and the like time shall be allowed for every additional twenty miles.
(RSMo 1939 § 1604) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1440; 1919 § 1890; 1909 § 2455
